description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a fenced yard and featuring a driveway leading to a detached garage. The main structure has a flat roof and large windows, with a visible front entrance and a small porch area. The property includes a driveway with two parked vehicles and a well-maintained lawn on all sides. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely finished in stucco or painted concrete, and the roof appears to be flat and slightly overhanging. The backyard is spacious and enclosed by a wooden fence, providing privacy and a clear boundary. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, fenced yard, detached garage, and a spacious driveway. The exterior is light-colored with large windows and a small front porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, two parked vehicles, and the detached garage at the rear.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the fenced yard, the flat roof, and the garage with visible vehicles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the bungalow, the garage, and the driveway extending to the street.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the backyard, fence, and the side elevation of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
